name: ida_get_function_asm
description: Linear disassembly for one function; plain text (IDA tags stripped). Plugin v4+: optional start_ea (hex) inside the function to begin at that head; skip_instructions skips additional heads after the anchor. Requires disasm op; check ida_ping / bridge_capabilities.disasm.

start_ea.title: Start Ea
start_ea.description: Hex EA or symbol; first emitted line is the head containing this address (must be inside the resolved function).

skip_instructions.title: Skip Instructions
skip_instructions.description: After the start anchor, skip this many additional instruction heads (e.g. skip prologue).

result.title: Result
result.description: Markdown with asm fenced block, or short error pointing to ida_ping if plugin too old.
